summary: Adds a retry wrapper comment and updates the config type. The change is focused and minimal.

findings.title: timeout type changed from number to number | string
findings.body: Changing `timeout` from `number` to `number | string` widens the type. Callers that assumed a number will now need coercion. Consider adding a `parseTimeout` helper at the edge instead.

findings.title: Vague comment: 'retry wrapper'
findings.body: The comment `// retry wrapper` doesn't explain what is wrapped or why. Consider a more descriptive comment linking to the retry logic above.

findings.title: __all__ should include all public names
findings.body: If `LegacyClient` is still part of the public API, it should be in `__all__`. If not, remove the import.

findings.title: This line is NOT in the diff — should be demoted
findings.body: This finding anchors to a line that is not in the diff. The inline command must demote it to the summary.
